projects.title: FormGuardian
projects.description: FormGuardian is a Chrome extension that helps users stay safe online by detecting insecure forms or those requesting sensitive data. Built to be lightweight and user-friendly, it runs in the background to provide real-time alerts and peace of mind while browsing.

projects.title: IMOB
projects.description: IMOB is a full property management system built to support real estate operations end to end. The platform covers property management, tenant and guarantor records, lease and invoice control, maintenance workflows, financial reporting, and economic index integration. The backend was structured using a repository-based architecture to ensure clear separation of concerns and long-term maintainability, with NestJS, PostgreSQL, and Prisma, while the frontend was built with React and TypeScript.

projects.title: Galvao Tatto Art
projects.description: Matheus Galvão is a tattoo artist specializing in black and gray realism. His portfolio website provides details on his work, studio location in Domingos Martins, Espírito Santo, and operating hours. You can also find links to his social media for appointments and to view his work.

projects.title: Volunteering embaixadores do rei
projects.description: Developed a responsive web app in a team setting to track attendance for church educational classes. Introduced a unique Bible verse check-in feature, implemented secure authentication with Supabase/PostgreSQL, and built tools to monitor participation trends and class progress.

projects.title: NextStop API
projects.description: Next stop API is an API for a social outing app. Develped in TypeScript, our team decided to use a layered hybrid architecture, using firebase for third party authentication and mongodb for data persistence. All third party services are abstracted into our API, contributing to a better maintainability

projects.title: RentalFlow
projects.description: RentalFlow is a short-term rental management web application built to work across different platforms and screen sizes. Our team used hexagonal architecture to keep the business logic isolated and decoupled from the rest of the application. We used PostgreSQL and Drizzle ORM for data persistence.
